message:
fix: Escape key only closes the topmost modal, not the sidebar behind it (#5540)

All modals opened from the AI Mission sidebar now call
stopImmediatePropagation() on Escape to prevent the event from
reaching the sidebar's own Escape handler. Fixed in:

- MissionBrowser (Browse Community Missions)
- MissionControlDialog (Mission Control)
- ClusterSelectionDialog (cluster picker)
- StandaloneOrbitDialog (Add Orbit)
- MissionDetailView modal (already fixed in #5371)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
